title: L'État, c'est moi
description: A administration/moderation plugin for small PaperMC SMP servers
body:
# L'État, c'est moi
A moderation and administration plugin for PaperMC servers. This plugin is intended to be used by small SMP servers.

## Commands
Required *
### /tempban
/tempban [player*] [reason*] [duration*]

String player

String reason

Time duration

### /mute
/mute [player*] [reason*]

String player

String reason

For mutes to work properly, you must make sure all other plugins that listen for AsyncChatEvent ignore cancelled events.

## /unmute
/unmute [player*] [reason*]

String player

String reason

### /tempmute
/tempmute [player*] [reason*] [duration*]

String player

String reason

Time duration
